name: Original Example Pack
description: An entirely original playbook (Wayfarer) and crew type (Couriers), proving the content-pack format without any core-book content.

special_abilities.name: Keen Eye
special_abilities.description: When you Survey unfamiliar territory, take +1d.

special_abilities.name: Silver Tongue
special_abilities.description: When you Sway a stranger you've just met, take +1 effect.

special_abilities.name: Long Road
special_abilities.description: You never suffer reduced effect from fatigue or bad weather.

special_abilities.name: Fleet-Footed
special_abilities.description: Your crew's couriers take +1d when racing against a deadline.

crew_upgrades.name: Way-Stations
crew_upgrades.description: A network of safe houses along the routes your crew travels.

playbooks.name: Wayfarer
playbooks.xp_trigger: Address a challenge by travelling into danger or the unknown.
